# This is the CMakeCache file.
# For build in directory: c:/dev/repos/ZipFX/deploy/build_win
# It was generated by CMake: C:/Program Files/CMake/bin/cmake.exe
# You can edit this file to change values found and used by cmake.
# If you do not want to change any of the values, simply exit the editor.
# If you do want to change a value, simply edit, save, and exit the editor.
# The syntax for the file is as follows:
# KEY:TYPE=VALUE
# KEY is the name of a variable in the cache.
# TYPE is a hint to GUIs for the type of VALUE, DO NOT EDIT TYPE!.
# VALUE is the current value for the KEY.

########################
# EXTERNAL cache entries
########################

//Enable or disable building the documentation

//Enable or disable path sanitization when extracting archives
// containing files with invalid Windows names
BIT7Z_PATH_SANITIZATION:BOOL=OFF

//Enable or disable regex matching of archived files

//Enable or disable using the OS native string type
//\n                                 (e.g., std::wstring on Windows,
// std::string elsewhere)
BIT7Z_USE_NATIVE_STRING:BOOL=OFF

//Enable or disable using type safe byte type (like std::byte)

BIT7Z_USE_STD_BYTE:BOOL=OFF

BIT7Z_USE_SYSTEM_CODEPAGE:BOOL=OFF
